ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board configuration */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the board configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the board configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the board belongs to */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number of the board configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the board configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the board configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the board configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the board configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin configuration */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the board configuration */,
  "board_reference" TEXT /* Board reference for the pin */,
  "schematic_signal_name" TEXT /* Schematic signal name for the pin */,
  "cyclonevgt_pin_number" TEXT /* Pin number on the CycloneVGT device */,
  "io_standard" TEXT /* I/O standard for the pin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pin's function */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal (e.g., input, output, bidirectional) */,
  "drive_strength" TEXT /* Drive strength of the pin */,
  "termination" TEXT /* Termination type (e.g., pull-up, pull-down, open-drain) */,
  "pull_up_resistor" INTEGER /* Presence of pull-up resistor */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the pin configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the pin configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* Manager of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, design verification engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_log" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pin configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_log_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "board_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the board configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the revision */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_board_revisions_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_board_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "board_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the board configuration */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., IC, resistor, capacitor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_board_components_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each board configuration
